results.title: UK leaks Trump's Iran war plan? Repeats this move seen before 28 Feb strikes US-Israeli strikes
results.description: After Trump publicly pressures Andy Burnham, the UK is pulling embassy staff out of Tehran and warning against all travel to Iran, Afghanistan, Iraq and Balochistan. This video asks if London is quietly leaking details of Washington’s Iran invasion planning to signal discomfort with escalation—even as it lets U.S. forces use British bases for strikes.

results.title: 9 support centres to be set up for ST communities
results.description: Goa Tribal Welfare to set up 9 Dharti Aaba Suvidha Kendras in ST villages; NGOs invited to apply by Aug 7 with funding, rent, staff and equipment support.

results.description: RU student begins hunger strike over lathi-charge on protesters in Delhi

results.title: Capt. Amar Simha Yadav Left Dubai Job, Joined Indian Army, And Then Made It To IIM Calcutta
results.description: He is embarking on a new mission of pursuing an MBA at the prestigious Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Calcutta.

results.title: Khader targets Centre over NEET issue
results.description: The minister demanded the resignation of the Union Education Minister, saying the controversy warranted political accountability.
